texto: One thing I've learned in all these years is not to make love when you really don't feel it
autor: there's probably nothing worse you can do to yourself than that.
explicacao: Citação de there's probably nothing worse you can do to yourself than that. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “One thing I've learned in all these years is not to make love when you really don't feel it” articula reflexao, norman-mailer, thing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
